chat.meta.title: Private Chat — end-to-end encrypted, peer-to-peer
chat.meta.description: A simple, secure 1-to-1 chat. Messages are end-to-end encrypted in your browser and relayed through a server that can never read them. Nothing is stored — when the session ends, it's gone for good.
chat.title: Private Chat
chat.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted, peer-to-peer. The relay only ever sees ciphertext, and nothing is stored.
chat.gate.title: Connect a wallet to start
chat.gate.desc: Private Chat identifies each person by their wallet address. Connect your biubiu passkey wallet, an injected wallet, or a paired wallet to continue.
chat.landing.createDesc: Create a private room and get a one-time link to share with one person.
chat.landing.joinDesc: Paste an invite link that someone shared with you.
chat.landing.invalidLink: That doesn't look like a valid invite link.
chat.landing.inviteTitle: You've been invited to a private chat
chat.landing.inviteDesc: Tap below to sign in with your wallet and open the encrypted channel.
chat.landing.preparingDesc: Confirm the signature in your wallet to prove your address.
chat.securing.title: Establishing a secure channel…
chat.securing.desc: Exchanging keys with your peer. This only takes a moment.
chat.waiting.title: Waiting for your peer…
chat.waiting.desc: Share this link with the one person you want to chat with. The channel opens as soon as they join.
chat.waiting.linkWarning: Anyone with this link can join. Share it privately, with one person.
chat.room.safetyHint: Confirm it matches on both screens
chat.room.emptyDesc: Messages are end-to-end encrypted and never stored. Say hello.
chat.safety.title: What is the safety code?
chat.safety.body: This code is computed from both peers' keys. If it reads the same on both screens, no one is secretly in the middle. If the codes differ, stop — the connection may be compromised.
chat.ended.desc: The session is over. The keys are gone and the history was cleared from this device — it can't be recovered.
chat.error.title: Something went wrong
chat.error.noWallet: No wallet is connected. Connect a wallet and try again.
chat.error.noSign: This wallet can't sign messages, which is required to start a chat.
chat.error.signFailed: The signature was declined or failed. Try again to start the session.
chat.error.roomFull: This room already has two people in it.
chat.error.tampered: The peer's key didn't match the invite link. For your safety, the connection was stopped.
chat.error.connectFailed: Couldn't reach the chat relay. Check your connection and try again.
chat.room.endConfirm.title: End this chat?
chat.room.endConfirm.message: This closes the session for both of you and clears the conversation from this device. It can't be undone.
chat.landing.identityNote: No sign-up needed — you'll appear as Anonymous, kept private by the safety code.
chat.landing.connectOptional: Connect a wallet for a verified identity (optional)
